text: The angular lines, glass partitions, and cooled lighting infuse this space with bureaucratic clarity. I feel adrift in the transitional quiet of a meeting room not yet filled; anticipation lingers in the air, as if the ideas and voices these walls expect are just out of reach. When I step into the R+D space and see the words and displays swirling with thoughts of growth, care, and innovation, I feel curiosity and a strange sense of potential. Here, intellect and possibility intermingle—a laboratory for minds and meanings. I am alert, reflective, and quietly eager to see what will emerge from this intersection of structure and imagination.
